_doc: Machine-readable mirror of RFC-004 BP-1 auto-pilot contracts. Single source of truth for cross-component invariants (canonical-field tables, classifier output schema, run-state schemas, subcommand argv + exit codes). Validator scripts/validate-rfc-contract-mirror.mjs diffs this against code surfaces on every PR/push (per Rule 13/14). v3.17 (slice 2e C4) added deadline-tick failure subtypes. v3.18 (slice 2f) adds sweep-naked-entries subcommand (Path B detection, M3 deferral pattern) and the bp1-activation-disabled state-transition surface for bp1-flag-flip --disable. Slice 2f canonical-field additions (bp1-naked-sweep-tick, -detected, -action-pending-m3, -no-key, bp1-activation-disabled, bp1-disable-marker-rm, bp1-disable-already) are registered in scripts/lib/bp1-canonicalize.mjs; bidirectional drift caught by validate-rfc-canonical-fields.mjs against the RFC payload block.

v2._terminal_states_doc: Slice 2d-R: terminal_states is the authoritative set of states from which no further transitions are allowed (markTerminal targets). validate-rfc-contract-mirror.mjs consumes this field to determine which v2.states require state-transition:<state> canonical entries (transition states do; terminal states do not, though entries for terminal states are allowed for replay-audit purposes). The active state is implicitly the initial state and is excluded from both transition + terminal sets.

confirm-approval._doc: Slice 2d-R. Transitions a run from awaiting_approval → outcome. This slice supports outcome=auto_approved only (deadline-expired path triggered by H1 hook). outcome=approved|aborted reserved for FU-2 operator-decision CLI. exit 5 deadline-not-expired guards against premature auto-approval (hook must verify deadline_at < now before invoking). exit 1 flag-check-refused (codex r1 P3 closure 2026-05-17) — direct CLI invocation in an inactive project; H1 hook pre-gates with flag-check so runtime blast radius is bounded to operator typing the command by hand.

sweep-naked-entries._doc: Slice 2f. Path B sweep tick: scans active runs for naked codex_review entries (no bp1-codex-request-sent evidence) older than the 5-min age threshold per RFC §555/§177. Mirrors check-deadlines exit-code shape (codex plan-tier r1 P1 closure 2026-05-19): lock-busy emits unsigned bp1-lock-busy evidence + writes parent tick with lock_busy=true + returns 0 (scheduled-task-friendly). exit 3 reserved for scan/load failures. Per-fire children: signed bp1-naked-sweep-detected when run.key is loadable; unsigned bp1-naked-sweep-no-key when not (mirrors A2 no-key audit). Per-candidate hand-off: unsigned bp1-naked-sweep-action-pending-m3 (M3 planning-team orchestrator consumes to drive em-review-request re-issue). --tick-source defaults to scheduled-task (alternative: fallback-sweep when invoked from --once executor).
